name: Chronomaly Sol Monolith
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>先史遺産</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>オーパーツ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ソル・モノリス
desc: Once per turn: You can target 1 "Chronomaly" monster you control; its Level becomes 6. You cannot Special Summon any monsters during the turn you activate this effect, except "Chronomaly" monsters.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can target 1 "Chronomaly" monster you control; its Level becomes 6. You cannot Special Summon any monsters during the turn you activate this effect, except "Chronomaly" monsters.
eff: Once per turn: You can target 1 "Chronomaly" monster you control; its Level becomes 6. You cannot Special Summon any monsters during the turn you activate this effect, except "Chronomaly" monsters.

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
